class.name: OpenXRSpatialMarkerTrackingCapability
class.brief_description: Implementation for handling spatial entity marker tracking logic.
class.description: This class handles the OpenXR marker tracking spatial entity extension.

method.name: do_entity_update
method.description: Calls [method OpenXRSpatialEntityExtension.update_spatial_entities] and [method OpenXRSpatialEntityExtension.query_snapshot] with the marker entities associated with [param spatial_context]. [param component_data] are the [OpenXRSpatialComponentData]s to update for this marker capability. If [param next_snapshot_create] is non-null, then pass this to the [code]next[/code] parameter in [method OpenXRSpatialEntityExtension.update_spatial_entities]. If [param next_snapshot_query] is non-null, then pass this to the [code]next[/code] parameter in [method OpenXRSpatialEntityExtension.query_snapshot].

method.name: is_april_tag_supported
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if April tag marker tracking is supported by the current device.

method.name: is_aruco_supported
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if Aruco marker tracking is supported by the current device.

method.name: is_micro_qrcode_supported
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if micro QR code marker tracking is supported by the current device.

method.name: is_qrcode_supported
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if QR code marker tracking is supported by the current device.

method.name: start_entity_discovery
method.description: Calls [method OpenXRSpatialEntityExtension.discover_spatial_entities] and [method OpenXRSpatialEntityExtension.query_snapshot] with the marker entities associated with [param spatial_context]. [param component_data] are the [OpenXRSpatialComponentData]s to discover for this marker capability. If [param next_snapshot_create] is non-null, then pass this to the [code]next[/code] parameter in [method OpenXRSpatialEntityExtension.discover_spatial_entities]. If [param next_snapshot_query] is non-null, then pass this to the [code]next[/code] parameter in [method OpenXRSpatialEntityExtension.query_snapshot]. [param user_callback], when non-null, is called with two parameters usually twice. The first parameter is the [RID] of the discovery snapshot and the second parameter is a boolean where [code]false[/code] indicates the discovery snapshot is about to be processed, and [code]true[/code] indicates the discovery snapshot has been processed and [param component_data] has valid data. The second call is skipped if an error was encountered. The returned [OpenXRFutureResult] is identical to the return from [method OpenXRSpatialEntityExtension.discover_spatial_entities].
